valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 31 Mar 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 1 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low 350 miles west of Bailey 998 expected 250 miles northeast of Iceland 977 by 1800 Tuesday. High just west of FitzRoy 1039 expected FitzRoy 1036 by same time
